conversions.title: Swim Time Converter
conversions.disclaimer: Conversions use Classical (Colorado Timing) factors. Converted times are estimates and not official.

trainingZones.title: Swim Time Converter — Training Zones
trainingZones.disclaimer: Zone paces are estimates from your goal time ({{paceModel}} model). Treat each pace as roughly ±1–3 seconds per 100. Not a substitute for lactate testing, CSS benchmarks, or your coach's set design.
